recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda 4
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Action, Comedy, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Po is gearing up to become the spiritual leader of his Valley of Peace, but also needs someone to take his place as Dragon Warrior. As such, he will train a new kung fu practitioner for the spot and will encounter a villain called the Chameleon who c

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Time in Shanghai
recommendations.overview: A laborer moves to Shanghai in the hope of becoming rich. But ends up using his kung fu skills to survive. Remake of The Boxer From Shantung.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
recommendations.overview: While Po and his father are visiting a secret panda village, an evil spirit threatens all of China, forcing Po to form a ragtag army to fight back.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda Holiday
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, TV Movie, Comedy, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: The Winter Feast is Po's favorite holiday. Every year he and his father hang decorations, cook together, and serve noodle soup to the villagers. But this year Shifu informs Po that as Dragon Warrior, it is his duty to host the formal Winter Feast at

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda: Secrets of the Masters
recommendations.overview: Po and the Furious Five uncover the legend of three of kung fu's greatest heroes: Master Thundering Rhino, Master Storming Ox, and Master Croc.

recommendations.title: The Pig, the Snake and the Pigeon
recommendations.overview: The arrogant, third most-wanted criminal in Taiwan, decides to get rid of the top two competitors and crowns himself the most-wanted criminal before dying.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda: Secrets of the Scroll
recommendations.overview: As Po looks for his lost action figures, the story of how the panda inadvertently helped create the Furious Five is told.

recommendations.title: Raya and the Last Dragon
